languages.text: "Вольный Торговец, я благодарю вас за вклад в наши изыскания. Мы с Нунциусом теперь можем в полном праве величать вас коллегой. Мне нужно измыслить, переосмыслить и обсудить новые вводные с Нунциусом. Прошу, найдите меня на мостике позже — мы должны подвести итог эксперимента".

"Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."
languages.original_text: "Вольный Торговец, я благодарю вас за вклад в наши изыскания. Мы с Нунциусом теперь можем в полном праве величать вас коллегой. Мне нужно измыслить, переосмыслить и обсудить новые вводные с Нунциусом. Прошу, найдите меня на мостике позже — мы должны подвести итог эксперимента".

traits.locale_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

"Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

"Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

languages.text: 「ローグトレーダー、研究に貢献してくれてありがとう。ヌンシウスと私は、君を仲間として認めることができる。この新しいデータについて、ヌンシウスと考える、再考し、議論する必要がある。後でブリッジで会おう。実験の結果について話し合う必要があるんだ」
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

traits.locale_text: 「ローグトレーダー、研究に貢献してくれてありがとう。ヌンシウスと私は、君を仲間として認めることができる。この新しいデータについて、ヌンシウスと考える、再考し、議論する必要がある。後でブリッジで会おう。実験の結果について話し合う必要があるんだ。」

languages.text: “行商浪人，感谢您对我们研究的贡献。从今以后，努恩修斯和我要由衷地称您一声同僚了。我需要思考和反思，并与努恩修斯讨论这些新数据。稍后请来舰桥找我——我们需要谈谈实验结果。”
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

traits.locale_text: “行商浪人，感谢您对我们研究的贡献。从今以后，努恩修斯和我要由衷地称您一声同僚了。我需要思考和反思，并与努恩修斯讨论这些新数据。稍后请来舰桥找我——我们需要谈谈实验结果。”

languages.text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je vous remercie pour votre contribution à nos recherches. Nuncius et moi pouvons maintenant vous considérer comme {mf|un|une} collègue à part entière. Sur ce, je dois réfléchir, revoir mon raisonnement et discuter de ces nouvelles données avec mon cher confrère. Rejoignez-moi sur la passerelle plus tard, je vous prie. Nous devrons parler des résultats de l'expérience. »
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Libre-marchand|Libre-marchande}, je vous remercie pour votre contribution à nos recherches. Nuncius et moi pouvons maintenant vous considérer comme {mf|un|une} collègue à part entière. Sur ce, je dois réfléchir, revoir mon raisonnement et discuter de ces nouvelles données avec mon cher confrère. Rejoignez-moi sur la passerelle plus tard, je vous prie. Nous devrons parler des résultats de l'expérience. »

languages.text: «Comerciante Independiente, le agradezco su contribución a nuestra investigación. Nuncius y yo podemos llamarle colega con total sinceridad. Debo pensar, repensar y debatir estos nuevos datos con Nuncius. Por favor, reúnase conmigo en el puente más tarde. Hablaremos sobre los resultados del experimento».
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

traits.locale_text: «Comerciante Independiente, le agradezco su contribución a nuestra investigación. Nuncius y yo podemos llamarle colega con total sinceridad. Debo pensar, repensar y debatir estos nuevos datos con Nuncius. Por favor, reúnase conmigo en el puente más tarde. Hablaremos sobre los resultados del experimento».

languages.text: "Hür Tacir, araştırmamıza yaptığınız katkı için teşekkür ederim. Nuncius ve ben artık size tüm samimiyetimizle meslektaş diyebiliriz. Bu yeni verileri düşünmem, sonra bir daha düşünmem ve Nuncius ile tartışmam gerekiyor. Lütfen daha sonra köprüde görüşelim. Deneyin sonuçlarını konuşmalıyız."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."

traits.locale_text: "Hür Tacir, araştırmamıza yaptığınız katkı için teşekkür ederim. Nuncius ve ben artık size tüm samimiyetimizle meslektaş diyebiliriz. Bu yeni verileri düşünmem, sonra bir daha düşünmem ve Nuncius ile tartışmam gerekiyor. Lütfen daha sonra köprüde görüşelim. Deneyin sonuçlarını konuşmalıyız."

languages.text: "{mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}, ich danke Euch für Euren Beitrag zu unserer Forschung. Nuncius und ich können Euch nun mit vollem Ernst als {mf|Kollegen|Kollegin} bezeichnen. Ich muss nachdenken und diese neuen Daten mit Nuncius diskutieren. Bitte kommt später auf die Brücke ... wir müssen die Ergebnisse des Experiments besprechen."
languages.original_text: "Rogue Trader, I thank you for your contribution to our research. Nuncius and I can now call you colleague in all earnestness. I need to think, rethink, and discuss this new data with Nuncius. Please find me on the bridge later — we must discuss the results of the experiment."
